case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. TERISHA DOLORES STATON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $950.36 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT STATON, TERISHA DOLORES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR-26-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY (REPRESENTATIVE SOSEFINA FLORES), PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT GRANTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT STATON, TERISHA DOLORES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STATON, TERISHA DOLORES $800.36 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $905.36 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT STATON, TERISHA DOLORES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED MAR-25-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT STATON, TERISHA DOLORES
